---
date: "2021-01-01"
title: "R Resources"
subtitle: "Recommended material about R elsewhere on the Web"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: marine-biology.csl
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc-title: "On this page"
    standalone: true
    toc-location: right
    page-layout: full
---

# Web resources about R

|--------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| AUTHOR             | TITLE
|--------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Garrett Grolemund  | [Hands-On Programming with R](https://jjallaire.github.io/hopr/)                      |
